faqs.question: What time of year are wasps most active in Howard Beach?
faqs.answer: Wasps are most active in Howard Beach from late spring through early fall (May through October), with peak activity in August and September. However, nests can form as early as April, so early detection and removal prevent larger infestations during summer months.
